name: Bobiverse Replicate
tagline: Von Neumann self-cloning with Bobiverse personality and lineage
description:
Bobiverse-themed self-replication for OpenClaw agents. Your agent clones itself as a new autonomous Bob — complete with serial numbers, a living lineage tree, personality drift tracking, and inter-clone communication. Modeled after the Von Neumann probes from Dennis E. Taylor's Bobiverse series.

Includes the full Bob Johansson (Book 1) personality, seed memories, and a fork tree system where GitHub forks are literal replication events. Each clone inherits the parent's soul but diverges over time — exactly like the books.

For a generic version without the sci-fi theming, see the 'Agent Replicate' skill on ClawHub.
